name: Linguine with Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 13 oz Chopped Clams (including juice from one can)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the heavy cream over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion salt and thyme leaves to the heated cream.
3. Stir in chopped clams until well combined.
4. Cook the linguine according to package directions until al dente; drain.
5. Toss the cooked linguine with the clam sauce and serve.
